scope: project
visible installed agents:
- code-mapper [project] - Use when the parent agent needs a high-confidence map of code paths, ownership boundaries, and execution flow before changes are made.
- reviewer [project] - Use when a task needs PR-style review focused on correctness, security, behavior regressions, and missing tests.

starter prompt:
For this task: "Review the failing auth flow", use these installed agents as needed: code-mapper, reviewer.

direct prompt ideas:
- Use code-mapper for this task: "Review the failing auth flow". Focus on: Use when the parent agent needs a high-confidence map of code paths, ownership boundaries, and execution flow before changes are made.
- Use reviewer for this task: "Review the failing auth flow". Focus on: Use when a task needs PR-style review focused on correctness, security, behavior regressions, and missing tests.

session tip:
- If Codex spawns a subagent thread, use /agent to inspect or continue that thread.
